title: Smoked Jamaican Salmon Bake
description: A sweet and savory Jamaican-inspired dish featuring smoked salmon, perfect for a date-night dinner. The combination of flavors and textures will leave you wanting more.

ingredients.name: Smoked salmon
ingredients.notes: Look for salmon that has been smoked with a sweet and spicy flavor profile

instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the smoked salmon in a single layer.
Mix together the brown sugar, allspice, thyme, and lime juice to create a Jamaican-inspired glaze.
Brush the glaze evenly over the top of the salmon, making sure to cover the entire surface.
